zh.lifeSummary: 當Elizabeth Plantagenet於1464年2月11日出生在英國英格蘭倫敦維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特時，她的父親Edward IV King of England21歲，母親Elizabeth Wayte19歲。她於1477年之前與Sir Thomas Lumley結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1503年2月11日在英國英格蘭達勒姆盧姆利享年39歲，埋葬在英國達勒姆達勒姆。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Elizabeth Plantagenet于1464年2月11日出生在英国英格兰倫敦維斯特明斯特帕拉斯 本 維斯特明斯特时，她的父亲Edward IV King of England21岁，母亲Elizabeth Wayte19岁。她于1477年之前与Sir Thomas Lumley结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1503年2月11日在英国英格兰達勒姆盧姆利享年39岁，埋葬在英国達勒姆達勒姆。

nameMeanings.name: Elizabeth
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual spelling of   Elisabeth   in English. It is recorded in the medieval period, but was made popular by being borne by  Queen Elizabeth I  of England (  1533–1603 ). In the 20th century it again became extremely fashionable, partly because it was the name of  Elizabeth Bowes-Lyon  (  1900–2002 ), who in  1936  became Queen Elizabeth as the wife of King George VI, and after his death in  1952  achieved great public affection as Queen Mother for nearly half a century. Even more influentially, it is the name of her daughter  Queen Elizabeth II  (  b. 1926 ).

variants.name: Elisabeth
meanings: The spelling of Elizabeth used in the Authorized Version of the New Testament, and in most modern European languages. This was the name of the mother of John the Baptist (Luke 1:60). Etymologically, the name means ‘God is my oath’, and is therefore identical with Elisheba, the name of the wife of Aaron according to the genealogy at Exodus 6:23. The final element seems to have been altered by association with Hebrew shabbāth ‘Sabbath’.

en.lifeSummary: When Elizabeth Plantagenet was born on 11 February 1464, in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom, her father, Edward IV King of England, was 21 and her mother, Elizabeth Wayte, was 19. She married Sir Thomas Lumley before 1477. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 11 February 1503, in Lumley, Durham, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 39, and was buried in Durham, Durham, England.

fr.Westminster Palace, London, England: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni
fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Elizabeth Plantagenet est née le 11 février 1464, à Palace of Westminster, Westminster, Londres, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, son père, Edward IV King of England, avait 21 ans et sa mère, Elizabeth Wayte, avait 19 ans. Elle a épousé Sir Thomas Lumley avant 1477. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 11 février 1503, à Lumley, Durham, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 39 ans, et a été enterrée à Durham, Durham, Angleterre.

de.Westminster Palace, London, England: Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Elizabeth Plantagenet am 11. Februar 1464 in Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, England, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Edward IV King of England 21 und ihre Mutter Elizabeth Wayte 19. Sie hat vor 1477 Sir Thomas Lumley geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 3 Töchter. Sie starb am 11. Februar 1503 im Alter von 39 Jahren in Lumley, Durham, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Durham, Durham, England begraben.

Lei sposato Sir Thomas Lumley prima del 1477. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 3 figlie. Morì il 11 febbraio 1503, nel Lumley, Durham, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 39 anni, e fu sepolta a Durham, Durham, England.

ko.Westminster Palace, London, England: 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터
ko.lifeSummary: Elizabeth Plantagenet(이)가 1464년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 런던 웨스트민스터 팔레이스 프 웨스트민스터에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Edward IV King of England(은)는 21세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Elizabeth Wayte(은)는 19세였다. 그녀는 1477년 이전 Sir Thomas Lumley(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1503년 2월 11일 영국 잉글랜드 뒤람 럼리에서 39세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 뒤람 뒤람에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Elizabeth Plantagenet nasceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1464, em Palace of Westminster, Westminster, London, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, seu pai, Edward IV King of England, tinha 21 anos e sua mãe, Elizabeth Wayte, tinha 19 anos. Ela casou-se com Sir Thomas Lumley antes 1477. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 3 filhas. Ela faleceu em 11 de fevereiro de 1503, em Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 39 anos, e foi sepultada em Durham, Durham, Inglaterra.

ru.Westminster Palace, London, England: палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Когда Elizabeth Plantagenet родилась 11 февраля 1464 г. в местности палеис оф вестминстир, вестминстир, Лондон, Англия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Edward IV King of England было 21 год, а матери, которую звали Elizabeth Wayte, 19. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Sir Thomas Lumley перед 1477 г. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 11 февраля 1503 г. в местности лумли, дурам, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 39 лет и была похоронена в местности дурам, дурам, Англия.

Murió el 11 de febrero de 1503, en Lumley, Durham, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 39 años, y fue sepultada en Durham, Durham, Inglaterra.
